About Me

Let's begin

Since the start of my career as a software engineer over 7 years ago. I have approached every problem as an opportunity to find a creative solution. I am especially passionate about working with Angular. I participated in 3 enterprise projects, where I learned in-depth how to use Angular, create accessible and clean code and how to effectively manage application state. I enjoy writing unit tests with help of JEST to ensure code is working correctly.

Michał Postek, Copyright © 2019
